high_level_description: A mango detective inspecting glowing footprints in a snowy art museum, a cinematic photograph with cold ambient lighting and reflective surfaces.

compositional_deconstruction.background: Large polished white marble floor reflecting overhead recessed lights, snowflakes falling in soft focus from a high vaulted ceiling with exposed beams, deep indigo walls lined with framed abstract paintings, frost patterns on the lower edge of the frame.

elements.desc: A detective in a charcoal trench coat and woolen scarf, bald with a sharp angular jaw, holding a magnifying glass in their right hand, bent slightly forward over a glowing footprint on the floor, one foot planted near the center-right of the frame.

Three glowing footprints in iridescent blue and gold, arranged in a curved trail from lower-left to upper-center, each casting a soft halo glow on the marble floor, faintly smudged with powdered snow.
White uppercase sans-serif label floating just above the last glowing footprint, angled slightly upward with a subtle drop shadow against the icy floor.
